name: VaultSparkStudios.github.io
currentFocus: Session 81 closed out: five CI-workflow fixes shipped in one commit chain resolved three chronic failures (Accessibility axe-cli, Lighthouse wait-on, E2E compliance sw.js drift), one S80-only regression (Sitemap push race), and one latent failure (playwright-axe lockfile). Key architectural move: retired `sw-version.yml`'s on-push trigger — it was fighting S77's fingerprinted shell pipeline over sw.js CACHE_NAME, producing the E2E compliance drift. Fingerprinted shell pipeline is now the single owner. S80 posture still applies: master audit 77/100 + 28-item Tier 1–4 plan, /ignis/ live, Public Operating Surface relocated off homepage.
nextMilestone: Confirm the in-progress Lighthouse + E2E runs green on commit 91ea72c follow-up, then resume Tier 2 depth work: Ask IGNIS concierge, unified cross-portal shell, /membership/ testimonials, /social/ aggregation, Forge Feed. CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN is still the highest-leverage single blocker for Tier 1 infrastructure items.
blockers: CF_WORKER_API_TOKEN missing — blocks edge-gating private portals, CSP nonce migration, and rate-limit/CSRF on forms (S80 Tier 1 infrastructure items)
Annual Stripe plan keys still do not exist, so annual checkout remains an honest preview only
